scripts.dev: node -e "const path=require('node:path'); const raw=process.env.npm_package_json || process.env.INIT_CWD || process.cwd(); const rootCandidate=raw.endsWith('package.json') ? path.dirname(raw) : raw; const root=rootCandidate.startsWith('\\\\?\\UNC\\') ? '\\\\' + rootCandidate.slice(8) : rootCandidate.startsWith('\\\\?\\') ? rootCandidate.slice(4) : rootCandidate; require(path.join(root, 'scripts', 'dev.cjs')).run()"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace apps/api && npm run build --workspace apps/web
